name: Q-11 --rollup appends one scorecard JSON line per invocation for downstream team aggregation
command: printf '%s' '{"commit":"abc"}' > manifest.json && : > drift.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc1 --manifest manifest.json --adrs-csv 'ADR-1' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 1 --rollup rollup.jsonl >/dev/null 2>&1 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc2 --manifest manifest.json --adrs-csv 'ADR-1' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 1 --rollup rollup.jsonl >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$(wc -l < rollup.jsonl | tr -d ' ')" = "2" ] && echo appended 1>&2
